calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff Bernstein Realty and James A. Michel, Esq. appeared for the Defendant, Jeremiah Kpoh. The matter settled per written stipulation read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
